problem id: 6806d715
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10101000 -> 01111110
  11000010 -> 11010001
  11011100 -> 01011001
  11111011 -> 10000011
  11000011 -> 10010001
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11110010 -> 11000101
  11010110 -> 11011110
  11111010 -> 11000011

query: 10110001
predicted answer: 00110100
